languages.text:
The user's weapon {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} is calculated using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, if those {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are higher.
The user gains +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} Intelligence.

traits.locale_text:
The user's weapon damage is calculated using their Intelligence instead of Strength and Ballistic Skill instead of Weapon Skill, if those characteristics are higher.
The user gains +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} Intelligence.
The user gains +{uip|Crit|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2}% critical hit chance for their melee attacks.

languages.text:
{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Урон{/g} от оружия обладателя аугмента рассчитывается по его {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Интеллекту{/g} вместо {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Силы{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Дальнему Бою{/g} вместо {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Ближнего Боя{/g}, если эти {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}характеристики{/g} выше.
обладатель аугмента получает +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Интеллекту{/g}.

languages.text:
La puntuación de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} del arma del usuario se calcula utilizando su {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Inteligencia{/g} en lugar de su {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Fuerza{/g}, y su {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Habilidad de proyectiles{/g} en lugar de su {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Habilidad de armas{/g}, si tales {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}características{/g} son mayores.
El usuario gana +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Inteligencia{/g}.

The user gains +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}.

El usuario gana +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Inteligencia{/g}.

languages.text:
Der Waffen{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}schaden{/g} des Nutzers wird basierend auf seiner {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligenz{/g} anstelle der {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Stärke{/g} und seiner {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistik-Fähigkeit{/g} anstelle der {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Waffenfähigkeit{/g} berechnet, wenn diese {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}Eigenschaften{/g} höher sind.
Der Nutzer erhält +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2}{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligenz{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The user's weapon {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} is calculated using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, if those {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are higher.
The user gains +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Der Waffen{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}schaden{/g} des Nutzers wird basierend auf seiner {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligenz{/g} anstelle der {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Stärke{/g} und seiner {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistik-Fähigkeit{/g} anstelle der {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Waffenfähigkeit{/g} berechnet, wenn diese {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}Eigenschaften{/g} höher sind.
Der Nutzer erhält +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2}{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligenz{/g}.

languages.text:
{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Zekâ{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Balistik Yetenek{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}niteliklerinin{/g} sırasıyla {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Kuvvet{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Silah Yeteneği{/g} niteliklerinden daha yüksek olduğu durumda kullanıcının silah {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasarı{/g}; Kuvvet yerine Zekâ, Silah Yeteneği yerine Balistik Yetenek niteliğine göre hesaplanır.
Kullanıcı, +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Zekâ{/g} kazanır.

The user gains +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Zekâ{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Balistik Yetenek{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}niteliklerinin{/g} sırasıyla {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Kuvvet{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Silah Yeteneği{/g} niteliklerinden daha yüksek olduğu durumda kullanıcının silah {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasarı{/g}; Kuvvet yerine Zekâ, Silah Yeteneği yerine Balistik Yetenek niteliğine göre hesaplanır.
Kullanıcı, +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Zekâ{/g} kazanır.

languages.text:
Les {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} de l'arme de l'utilisateur sont calculés en fonction de son {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} au lieu de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Force{/g} et de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Capacité de tir{/g} au lieu de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Capacité de combat{/g}, selon ses {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}caractéristiques{/g} les plus élevées.
L'utilisateur gagne +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The user's weapon {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} is calculated using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, if those {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are higher.
The user gains +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Les {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} de l'arme de l'utilisateur sont calculés en fonction de son {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} au lieu de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Force{/g} et de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Capacité de tir{/g} au lieu de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Capacité de combat{/g}, selon ses {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}caractéristiques{/g} les plus élevées.
L'utilisateur gagne +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}.

languages.text:
如果{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}弹道技能{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}属性{/g}更高，使用者计算武器{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}时使用智力代替{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}力量{/g}，弹道技能代替{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}武器技能{/g}。
使用者的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}提高{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2}点。
languages.original_text:
The user's weapon {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} is calculated using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, if those {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are higher.
The user gains +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
如果{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}弹道技能{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}属性{/g}更高，使用者计算武器{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}时使用智力代替{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}力量{/g}，弹道技能代替{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}武器技能{/g}。
使用者的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}提高{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2}点。

languages.text:
使用者の武器{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}は、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}筋力{/g}の代わりに{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}知力{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}近接技能{/g}の代わりに{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}射撃技能{/g}を用いて計算される（それらの{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}能力値{/g}の方が高い場合）。
使用者は{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}知力{/g}+{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2}を得る。

The user's weapon {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} is calculated using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, if those {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are higher.
The user gains +{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}.

使用者は{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}知力{/g}+{uip|INT|e957f0ad0c0144f29f2340ce3134aad2}を得る。
